title: abutilon macrum
intro: Abutilon macrum, also known as the velvet leaf abutilon, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Abutilon macrum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
